attractions.name: Halong Bay Day Cruise
attractions.description: UNESCO World Heritage Site cruise through emerald waters with dramatic limestone karsts. Includes Surprising Cave, Titop Island, and Luon Cave

attractions.name: Halong Bay
attractions.description: UNESCO World Heritage site with emerald-green waters and towering limestone karsts, explored by overnight cruise

attractions.name: Sung Sot Cave (Surprise Cave)
attractions.description: Famous grotto with impressive stalactites and dramatic cave chambers shaped naturally over thousands of years

attractions.name: Surprising Cave (Sung Sot Cave)
attractions.description: One of the largest and most impressive caves in Halong Bay with vast chambers filled with stalactites and stalagmites shaped like animals and sea creatures

attractions.name: Titop Island
attractions.description: Beautiful island known for its sandy beach and panoramic viewpoints with spectacular views of Halong Bay

attractions.name: Luon Cave
attractions.description: One of Halong Bay's most scenic natural formations where you paddle through a natural limestone arch into a quiet hidden lagoon surrounded by cliffs

attractions.name: Le Journey Classic Cruise Halong Bay
attractions.description: Traditional Vietnamese cruise through emerald waters dotted with towering limestone karsts, featuring kayaking, cave exploration, and onboard dining

attractions.name: Surprising Cave
attractions.description: Cave in Bo Hon archipelago with kayaking opportunities in Luon Cave
source_files: Vietnam/Vietnam- All Inclusive Guide- Vishnu Prasad.pdf

attractions.name: Titov Island
attractions.description: Island with sandy beach and Titov Peak for panoramic view of the bay
source_files: Vietnam/Vietnam- All Inclusive Guide- Vishnu Prasad.pdf

attractions.name: Halong Bay Cruise
attractions.description: Overnight luxury cruise through emerald waters and towering limestone karsts with cave exploration and sunset viewing

transport_options.description: Luxury cruise experience through limestone karsts and emerald waters
Boat cruises through Halong Bay's limestone karsts and islands

source_files: Vietnam/Vietnam- All Inclusive Guide- Vishnu Prasad.pdf
